description: Wixie inference-engine hooks — advisory-only. Notify when an artifact lands; never auto-trigger reconcile. Emit model-freshness telemetry on SessionStart (F-006).

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ "${WIXIE_INFERENCE_ENABLED:-0}" = "1" ] && [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -Eq "(state/precedent\.jsonl|plugins/inference-engine/state/artifacts\.jsonl)$"; then echo "[inference-engine] artifact landed: $(basename "$FILE") — /inference-reconcile when ready" >&2; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'if [ -n "${CLAUDE_SUBAGENT:-}" ]; then exit 0; fi; python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/model-freshness.py" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; exit 0'
